name: ots
description: A plugin that produces an automatic extractive summary of a document's text content using OTS (Open Text Summarizer).

process.description: Summarize the document's extracted text content using OTS.

filePath.description: The path to the source document.

textContent.description: Extracted text content from upstream plugins (e.g. markitdown).

ocrText.description: OCR-extracted text from upstream plugins (e.g. ocrmypdf).

summaryRatio.description: Percentage of sentences to retain (1-100). Defaults to 20.

languageCode.description: ISO 639-1 language code for OTS dictionary selection (e.g. 'en', 'de'). Provided by the langid plugin.

summaryLanguage.description: The language code used for dictionary lookup, or null if no dictionary was found.

installed.description: Check if the ots tool is available on the system.

install.description: Install OTS via the system package manager.

success.description: Indicates whether ots was installed successfully.
